session.assistant:
## Summary
`make fast-ci` failed with exit code 2. Here are the key issues:
### Failures Found:
1. **Exec Reference Check**: The file `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date. Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate.
2. **Type Checking (ty) Errors**: Multiple type errors in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py`: - Missing required parameter `prompt_executor` in calls to `dispatch_one_shot_remote()` (2 occurrences at lines 301 and 813) - Unknown argument `llm_caller` passed to `dispatch_one_shot_remote()` (2 occurrences) - `ErkContext` object has no attribute `llm_caller`
3. **Test Failures**: 18 tests failed, 5763 passed: - **Skills bundling issue**: `'refac-mock-to-fake'` skill is not listed in either `bundled_skills()` or `_UNBUNDLED_SKILLS` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/capabilities/skills/bundled.py` - **Objective plan command tests** (4 failures): All related to missing `llm_caller` attribute in `ErkContext` - **Workflow smoke test** (1 failure): Same `llm_caller` issue - **One-shot plan tests** (7 failures): All related to missing `llm_caller` attribute - **One-shot dispatch tests** (6 failures): All related to unexpected `llm_caller` keyword argument in `dispatch_one_shot_remote()`
### Checks That Passed: - AGENTS.md standard check - All linting checks - Code formatting check - Prettier check - Markdown check - erk-dev package tests (136 passed) - erk-statusline package tests (115 passed) - erk-mcp package tests (24 passed)
